title: Department Manager Vacancy at Dulux Decorator Centre - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Dulux Decorator Centre - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Dulux Decorator Centre are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Patna. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Dulux Decorator Centre:
Dulux Decorator Centre is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Ensure compliance with company policies and retail regulations
• Conduct regular stock audits and prevent pilferage
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Planogram
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in SAP Retail
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in POS Systems
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Annual performance appraisal
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Patna, Bihar, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dulux Decorator Centre!
